title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
